channel.title: ThreatDigest Hub - Curated Cyber Incidents
channel.description: A curated list of recent cyber incidents, attacks, and security threats.

item.title: [DARK WEB] akira ransomware: new victim 'Paass Logistik' (DE)
item.description:
Discovery Date: 2026-03-06
Tonight, the silence of the Persian pages of the Zionist army has been broken. Handala Hack is here;...

item.title: [DARK WEB] ThreatFox: Unknown malware — 10 new IOCs detected
[DARK WEB] ThreatFox: FAKEUPDATES — 2 new IOCs detected
item.description:
ThreatFox Database
Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) on ThreatFox are associated with a certain malware fas. A malware sample can be associated with only one malware family. The page below gives you an overview on indicators of compromise associated with fakeupdates .

item.title: Only 24% Of organizations Test Identity Recovery Every Six Months
item.description: Just 24% of organizations test their identity disaster recovery plans every six months, according to new research which examined how businesses prepare for identity-focused cyber-attacks. The findings suggested that despite rising investment in identity threat detection and response (ITDR), many organizations remain poorly prepared to restore critical authentication systems after a breach. The data comes from Quest Software’s latest report, a global survey of 650 IT and security practitioners...

item.title: Cybersecurity regulations face conflicting definitions, delays, industry warns
